jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.
freshAuditPolicy.completionAuditDetail: Checklist completion requires a broad audit plus software-tester-style real browser/visual QA on production before a new remediation round starts. Use browser login and click through major pages/workflows visually; split into batches if needed; record/fix/triage findings in remediation-backlog.md before continuing.
completionQaBatches: QA batch 1: login, shell/navigation, dashboard, global search, notifications, preferences/default-page behavior, responsive layout
QA batch 2: VPS/server management and SSH terminal, including Direct Gateway eligibility and idle stability
QA batch 3: Files/storage/SFTP/upload/download/direct access, including sync warnings, capabilities, share links, signed/direct access
QA batch 4: Downloads, Quick Services, Commands, Requests, Deployments, Scheduled Tasks, Templates, Operation Tasks

QA batch 5: Backups/restore, Monitoring, Health/System Health, Settings/admin runtime tuning, Tickets, Announcements/Snippets, API Tokens, AI providers, image bed, API docs, audit/security-adjacent operator flows

lastHealthyBaseline.lint: passed with existing client-effect warnings only
lastHealthyBaseline.tests: settings-client targeted Vitest passed: 1 file / 9 tests
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws active after restart; /api/status healthy; /settings 307, /api/settings 401, /api/status 200; recent service logs clean; browser light-theme Settings visual check confirmed runtime labels and disabled SMTP fields are readable

lastRun.summary: During the required real browser visual QA gate, SMTP settings still looked active when SMTP was disabled. SMTP connection fields now become disabled with clear helper text and readable light-theme styling until the SMTP toggle is enabled; Settings switches now expose role=switch labels for accessibility.
validation: No overlapping remediation/build/test process detected at start
Git and origin/main were aligned at start
Browser login and Settings visual QA observed SMTP disabled fields looked active before the fix
SettingsClient regression passed: SMTP fields are disabled/readable until enabled and become enabled after toggling SMTP on
npm run lint passed with existing client-effect warnings only
Production services restarted and /api/status returned healthy
Recent vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws logs contained no new error/warn matches
Post-deploy browser light-theme visual check confirmed disabled SMTP fields and runtime labels are readable
lastRun.deployment: Deployed by rebuilding, restarting vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service, and passing smoke/probes/log checks.
lastRun.nextTarget: Commit/push this Settings visual-QA SMTP disabled-state fix, then continue checklist completion visual QA batches.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified

productDirection: Favor exposing safe operational and UX tuning knobs in administrator settings instead of hard-coding or env-only configuration; keep secrets and truly infrastructure-only values env-only. Current checklist completion must be followed by real browser/visual QA before a new remediation round.
